title: Federal Operator 99
director: Spencer Gordon Bennet, Yakima Canutt, Wallace Grissell
writer: Albert DeMond, Basil Dickey, Jesse Duffy
actors: Marten Lamont, Helen Talbot, George J. Lewis
plot: Crime lord Jim Belmont escapes FBI custody and begins a reign of thievery that is thwarted at every turn by Jerry Blake, the FBI's Operator 99.
